login.title: osu! Modding Forum
login.tagline: Private modding collaboration for osu! mappers
login.e2eeBody: All mapset data is end-to-end encrypted with AES-256-GCM. The server cannot read your content. Your mapset passphrase is never sent to the server.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.emptyState: No mapsets yet. Create one to get started.

passphraseModal.title: Unlock Mapset
passphraseModal.intro: This mapset is end-to-end encrypted. Enter the passphrase to unlock it.
passphraseModal.label: Passphrase

createMapsetModal.title: Create Mapset
createMapsetModal.titleWarning: The title will be visible to anyone who sees the invitation link or has database access. It is not encrypted — do not include private information.
createMapsetModal.oszHelpPrefix: Auto-fills title and song length, then creates one difficulty per .osu file inside the archive, with sections from
createMapsetModal.warningBody: If you lose this passphrase and no other member has it, all mapset data is permanently unrecoverable. There is no server-side recovery.
createMapsetModal.confirmSavedLabel: I have saved this passphrase in a secure location.
createMapsetModal.errorGeneric: Failed to create mapset. Please try again.
createMapsetModal.errorOszEmpty: No valid .osu files found in this .osz archive.
createMapsetModal.importFailure: Mapset created, but difficulty import failed: {{message}}

createDifficultyModal.title: Add Difficulty
createDifficultyModal.osuHelpSuffix: client-side. Max 1 MB; the file itself is not uploaded.
createDifficultyModal.errorKeyMissing: Encryption key not found. Please unlock the mapset first.
createDifficultyModal.toastBookmarkPartial: Difficulty created. Imported {{created}} of {{total}} sections before failing: {{message}}. Re-running Import Bookmarks will create the remaining sections but won't pre-fill their content (base history now exists).
createDifficultyModal.toastBookmarkFailure: Difficulty created, but bookmark import failed: {{message}}
createDifficultyModal.toastFollowupFailed: Difficulty created, but a follow-up step failed: {{message}}

renameDifficultyModal.title: Rename Difficulty
renameDifficultyModal.errorKeyMissing: Encryption key not found. Please unlock the mapset first.

createSectionModal.title: Add Section
createSectionModal.errorKeyMissing: Encryption key not found. Please unlock the mapset first.
createSectionModal.errorInvalidFormat: Invalid end time format. Use MM:SS:MMM (e.g. 00:30:000).
createSectionModal.errorTooEarly: End time must be at least 1 second after the automatically computed start time ({{time}}).
createSectionModal.errorPastSong: End time may not exceed the song length ({{time}}).

editSectionModal.title: Edit Section
editSectionModal.errorKeyMissing: Encryption key not found. Please unlock the mapset first.
editSectionModal.errorInvalidFormat: Invalid end time format. Use MM:SS:MMM (e.g. 00:30:000).
editSectionModal.errorTooEarly: End time must be at least 1 second after the section start time ({{time}}).
editSectionModal.errorPastNext: End time must be at least 1 second before the next section's end time ({{time}}). Editing past it would shrink the next section below 1 second.
editSectionModal.errorPastSong: End time may not exceed the song length ({{time}}).

sectionDetail.empty: No posts for this section yet.
sectionDetail.deleteConfirm: Delete section "{{name}}"? This permanently removes the section and all of its posts and uploaded .osu versions. This cannot be undone.

createPostForm.bodyPlaceholder: Write your post here... e.g. 00:46:140 (2,3,4) - these are too close
createPostForm.errorLocked: Mapset is locked. Please unlock it first.
createPostForm.errorGeneric: Failed to submit post. Please try again.

manageMembers.title: Manage Members
manageMembers.shareHint: Share this passphrase with invited members so they can unlock the mapset.
manageMembers.notCached: Passphrase is not cached in this session. Reload-and-unlock to cache it again, or share the one you saved when creating the mapset.
manageMembers.previewHint: UI-only preview of what a lower role sees. The server still authorizes you as owner, so this is not a security boundary — don't rely on it to test access control.
manageMembers.errorDemoteSelf: You cannot demote yourself. Transfer ownership to another member first.
manageMembers.confirmTransfer: Transfer ownership to {{username}}? You will be demoted to mapper.

sectionHistory.title: Section Version History
sectionHistory.createdBaseTitle: Originally created Base v{{version}} on upload

importBookmarks.errorKeyMissing: Encryption key not found. Please unlock the mapset first.

osuUpload.errorLocked: Mapset is locked. Enter the passphrase first.
osuUpload.sanitizeBody: Your file contains content outside this section's time range. Uploading it as-is would duplicate that content when the difficulty is merged. We can drop it for you before uploading.
osuUpload.sanitizeFootnote: Anything sitting exactly on the section's end time is treated as belonging to the next section and dropped. A break event whose start or end falls outside this section's range is also dropped — including a long break that spans the whole section. If you need that break, split it so it fits within one section before uploading.
osuUpload.ownerBody: You are about to change critical settings on the base. Every collaborator's section will use these settings going forward.
osuUpload.mapperBody: Your diff's critical settings differ from the active base. Make sure you're uploading the correct difficulty.
osuUpload.mapperFootnote: Clicking "I'm aware" will normalize your file's critical lines to match the base before uploading.
osuUpload.assignmentWarning: This section is assigned to @{{username}}. Upload anyway?
osuUpload.legacyBody: The uploaded file differs from the active base. Review the changes below:
osuUpload.normalize: Normalize critical lines to match active base

mapsetPage.previewingSuffix: . UI gating only — the server still treats you as owner, and any post you write is still authored by you.
mapsetPage.previewingGhost: Previewing this mapset as a ghost member (read-only). UI gating only — the server still treats you as owner.
mapsetPage.deleteDifficultyBodySuffix: ? This will permanently remove all its sections, posts, and uploaded .osu versions.
mapsetPage.selectSection: Select a section from the timeline above to view its details and posts.
mapsetPage.noPostsYet: No posts yet. Be the first to post!
mapsetPage.confirmDeletePost: Are you sure you want to delete this post?
mapsetPage.toastDifficultyDeleted: Difficulty scheduled for deletion. You can restore it within 7 days.
mapsetPage.pendingDownloadSkippedSections_one: Download complete, but {{count}} section could not be included (no active version or decryption error).
mapsetPage.pendingDownloadSkippedSections_other: Download complete, but {{count}} sections could not be included (no active version or decryption errors).
mapsetPage.toastCannotDeleteLastSection: Cannot delete the final section — shorten it instead so its hit objects aren't lost.
mapsetPage.toastDeleteNeedsUnlock: Unlock the mapset first — the encryption key is required to safely migrate hit objects before deleting.
mapsetPage.toastImported_one: Imported {{count}} section with content from bookmarks.
mapsetPage.toastImported_other: Imported {{count}} sections with content from bookmarks.
mapsetPage.toastImportedNoPrefill_one: Imported {{count}} section from bookmarks. (Base history exists, so section content was not pre-filled.)
mapsetPage.toastImportedNoPrefill_other: Imported {{count}} sections from bookmarks. (Base history exists, so section content was not pre-filled.)
mapsetPage.ghostBanner: You were removed from this mapset. Read-only access expires on {{date}}.
